name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-1
title: list-items.py silently omits items from some features
description: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BUG-1 exists on origin/bug-backlog-files (sha: 541f3989aa39115c780466ad0e7892e4bbc0062e) but was not returned by list-items.py --type all --status open. The item is correctly structured (valid item.json, committed and pushed). No error was raised — the script returned silently with a truncated list. Root cause unknown; likely a walk/filter defect in branch_ops.read_branch() that drops items from certain features or directory depths.

history.note: Cannot reproduce: list-items.py returned all 14 items including TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BUG-1 on retest 2026-05-17. Likely fixed at some point without closing the item.
